room.caption: [G4-SA1] Zero decided to take a job selling Turbo Smoothies to hot chicks on the beach instead. Robots go to the beach, right?
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(29) global.mapTeleport=9
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh8MainB)
sigmaBack=instance_create(0,0,oCh8Back) sigmaBack.type=0; sigmaBack.yStart=560; sigmaBack.backColor=make_color_rgb(24,0,48)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(410) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
